parameters.subject: BCBSA_FEP_MBR_ENR Member Or Enrollment file Empty
parameters.body: This e-mail is to inform you that one of the FEP Member or Enrollment files is empty and not processed.

parameters.subject: BCBSA_FEP_MBR_ENR Member No Matches
parameters.body: This e-mail is to inform you that the FEP Member and Enrollment files have been processed for this month and there are some unknown Members. The records have been dropped and added to a file.
